title: Doric Weekly Market Insight
summary:
Seasonality is historically favourable during the first half of the fourth quarter but its dynamic usually fades towards the end of the year. By Michalis Voutsinas
Capesizes made headlines for yet another time. However, this week, it was not because of the meteoric rise of Baltic Capesize indices but rather their steep fall.
